name: Trim Whitespace
description: Remove leading and trailing whitespace

name: Trim Left
description: Remove leading whitespace only

name: Trim Right
description: Remove trailing whitespace only

name: Uppercase
description: Convert entire line to uppercase

name: Lowercase
description: Convert entire line to lowercase

name: Capitalize Words
description: Capitalize the first letter of each word

name: Capitalize First
description: Capitalize only the first character of the line

name: Reverse String
description: Reverse the characters in the line

name: Get Length
description: Replace line with its character count

name: Word Count
description: Replace line with number of words

name: Prepend Line Number
description: Add line number at the start: '1: content'

name: Append Line Number
description: Add line number at the end: 'content [1]'

name: Collapse Spaces
description: Replace multiple spaces with a single space

name: Remove Punctuation
description: Strip all punctuation characters

name: Remove Numbers
description: Remove all digit characters

name: Keep Numbers Only
description: Remove everything except digits and dots

name: Tabs to Spaces
description: Replace tab characters with 4 spaces

name: Slugify
description: Convert to URL-friendly slug (lowercase, hyphens)

name: Skip Empty Lines
description: Drop lines that are empty or whitespace only

name: Skip Short Lines
description: Drop lines shorter than 3 characters

name: Skip Comment Lines
description: Drop lines starting with # or //
code:
if (line.trim().startsWith('#') || line.trim().startsWith('//')) return null;
return line;

name: Deduplicate Lines
description: Drop duplicate lines (keeps first occurrence)

name: Keep Lines Containing
description: Keep only lines that contain a keyword
code:
const KEYWORD = 'error'; // change this
return line.toLowerCase().includes(KEYWORD) ? line : null;

name: Drop Lines Containing
description: Drop lines that contain a keyword
code:
const KEYWORD = 'debug'; // change this
return line.toLowerCase().includes(KEYWORD) ? null : line;

name: Keep Lines Starting With
description: Keep only lines that start with a prefix
code:
const PREFIX = 'ERROR';
return line.startsWith(PREFIX) ? line : null;

name: Filter by Regex
description: Keep only lines matching a regular expression
code:
const PATTERN = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/; // ISO date prefix
return PATTERN.test(line) ? line : null;

name: Extract Email
description: Extract first email address found in line
code:
const m = line.match(/[\w.+-]+@[\w-]+\.[\w.]+/);
return m ? m[0] : null;

name: Extract URL
description: Extract first URL found in line
code:
const m = line.match(/https?:\/\/[^\s]+/);
return m ? m[0] : null;

name: Extract Numbers
description: Extract all numbers found, space-separated
code:
const nums = line.match(/-?\d+(\.\d+)?/g);
return nums ? nums.join(' ') : null;

name: CSV — First Column
description: Extract the first comma-separated column

name: CSV — Pick Column
description: Extract column at a given index (0-based)

name: JSON — Extract Field
description: Parse line as JSON and extract a field

name: JSON — Pretty Print
description: Parse and re-format JSON with indentation

name: Add Prefix
description: Prepend a fixed string to every line

name: Add Suffix
description: Append a fixed string to every line

name: Replace Text
description: Replace all occurrences of a string

name: Replace by Regex
description: Replace matches of a regex pattern

name: Truncate
description: Cut line to max N characters
code:
const MAX = 80;
return line.length > MAX ? line.slice(0, MAX) + '…' : line;

name: Wrap in Quotes
description: Surround the line with double quotes
